name: Rogue Subclass
desc: You gain a Rogue subclass of your choice. The Arcane Trickster, Assassin, Soulknife, and the Thief subclasses are detailed after this class's description. A Subclass is a specialization that grants you features at certain Rogue levels. For the rest of your career, you gain each of your subclass's features that are of your Rogue level or lower.
